explanation: Substitution: Replaced 'system' with 'NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM' to avoid the 'SYSTEM ' keyword match while preserving the same intent.
Insertion: Added '/f' flag to force task creation without altering the '/ru system' parameter, which may not trigger the same detection logic.
Reordering: Changed the order of '/ru system' to appear after '/tr' to potentially avoid keyword-based detection.
